ip.title: 3. Intellectual Property
ip.p1: All elements of the cyna.fr website (texts, images, logos, icons, sounds, software, etc.) are the exclusive property of CYNA SAS or its partners.
ip.p2: Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or adaptation of all or part of the site's elements, by any means or process, is prohibited without prior written consent from CYNA SAS.

liability.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: CYNA SAS strives to ensure the accuracy and currency of the information published on this site. However, CYNA SAS cannot guarantee the accuracy, precision or completeness of the information provided.
liability.p2: CYNA SAS shall not be liable for direct or indirect damages resulting from access to or use of the site, including unavailability, data loss or any other harm.

links.title: 5. Hyperlinks
links.p1: The site may contain links to other websites. CYNA SAS has no control over these sites and accepts no responsibility for their content.

law.title: 6. Applicable Law
law.p1: This site and its legal notices are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to the use of the site shall fall under the exclusive jurisdiction of the French courts.
